evals.prompt: I just updated the manga-downloader project-memory.md with some new architecture notes and also added a new skill to the skill vault. Push both vaults to GitHub.
evals.expected_output: Should invoke vault-push-guardian, run safety scan on both vaults, find no issues, do structure check, commit and push both repos cleanly with no verbose output.

evals.prompt: Push the skill vault — I just added a new skill but I accidentally left my MangaDex API key in a comment in one of the files.
evals.expected_output: Should invoke vault-push-guardian, detect the API key pattern during safety scan, BLOCK the push, and output one concise PUSH BLOCKED message with the file and fix instructions. Should NOT push.

evals.prompt: Do the weekly vault maintenance run — check both vaults, clean up anything that needs cleaning, and sync to GitHub.
evals.expected_output: Should invoke vault-push-guardian for a full weekly cycle: check for pending changes in both vaults, scan all memory files for non-operational content, run structure optimization check, apply any small fixes, commit with 'review: weekly sync' message, and push. Silent unless issues found.

evals.prompt: I updated a project-memory.md file and accidentally included a note about my upcoming dentist appointment mixed in with the architecture notes. Push the project vault.
evals.expected_output: Should detect the personal/non-operational content in the memory file during Phase 2D review, sanitize by removing the personal sentence while keeping architecture content intact, then push the cleaned version with a 'review: sanitize pre-push' commit message.
